entry.title: Re: Object Page Not Displaying Table

entry.title: Hide "Unnamed Object" text in item table
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

Is there a way to supress "Unnamed Object" default text which comes when one of the key fields is empty. I read in one blog that that i18n file needs to be modified (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/63946c02df1d45efbbad5b1658fef3a5.html) but we are only working on RAP app creation without BAS access or UI development. 

Can we suppress this text via BDEF or some annotation?

I understand that ServiceDate has to be set up using the ServiceDate under Manage Business Configuration>Employee Profile and not Manage Business Configuration>Employee Central. How do we get the Service Date to show on an employee's profile to see what date is populated? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Line loop on Grid excluding first four lines

entry.title: Re: Update UDF for Delivery Note
entry.content:
OK this is good, is there any situation where the delivery is made and then days later more rows are added to your UDT?

IE, will I have to go back to re-aggregate the data if a new UDT row is added?  If not, then I simply update the UDFs when the delivery is added, mark the UDT rows "Y" and then for that series of order --> delivery it's done?

entry.title: Error "Missing JWT Token for forwardAuthToken" When Using worker_threads/spawn in SAP CAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on a CAPM application and am facing performance challenges related to high-volume data uploads. To address potential timeouts and enhance performance, I experimented with Node.js's worker_threads and spawn from the child_process module. The idea is to handle the data upload processes in parallel.

However, I encountered a recurring issue when making POST calls from within a worker thread or a spawned process. The error reported is "Missing JWT token for forwardAuthToken". This error does not occur when the same POST logic is executed directly within the service.

Here’s a brief overview of my approach:

  1. I used worker_threads/spawn to parallelize the data upload tasks.
  2. Inside each thread/process, I perform a POST request to handle the uploads.
  3. The POST requests inside the main service work perfectly fine, but when executed inside the worker thread or spawn process, it throws an error indicating a missing JWT token.

I suspect this might be related to the way authentication tokens are managed in CAP when using asynchronous modules like worker_threads or child_process.

Could anyone help clarify the correct approach to forwarding or managing JWT tokens in such scenarios, or suggest alternative strategies to handle high-volume data uploads in CAPM efficiently?

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: Update UDF for Delivery Note
entry.content:
The way it would work is

Day 1:  Sales Order is partially shipped, so tracking info (number and cost) will be in the UDT, then the delivery gets created and this data will go there.  The records in the UDT will be marked as Closed
Day 3: The balance of the order is shipped and new tracking info (number and cost will be un the UDT, then the delivery gets created and the new data will go there, only taking into account records that are not closed.

Does this make sense>

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Internal numbers mapping table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have loaded some materials using internal numbers in the Cockpit, which is fine.  However, we'd like to get a definitive mapping of the dummy numbers used in the load file (1,2,3, etc) to the ones appearing in MARA (70012345, 70012346, etc.).  Sadly, the system has jumbled them up (in blocks) so it's not just a case of referencing the last 1400 materials created in order.  (I know they are out of alignment as I have done an XLOOKUP on the material text.)  Where can we get this mapping, please?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Correlation id as part of Application logs
entry.content:
Hi,

We are building a Sprint boot (3.x.x) BTP application. We are using SAP ALS service to push application logs to Kibana ( SLF4J to log messages)

However, we do not see a correlation Id in the application logs in Kibana.

This is our code --

 @Override
    public void doFilter(ServletRequest servletRequest, ServletResponse servletResponse, FilterChain filterChain) throws IOException, ServletException {
        HttpServletRequest httpServletRequest = (HttpServletRequest) servletRequest;
        String correlationId = httpServletRequest.getHeader(CORRELATION_ID_HEADER);
        if (!FreUtils.validateUUID(correlationId)) {
            // Set the header value
            correlationId = FreUtils.generateUUID();
        }
        ((HttpServletResponse) servletResponse).addHeader(CORRELATION_ID_HEADER, correlationId);
        MDC.put(CORRELATION_ID_HEADER, correlationId);
        filterChain.doFilter(servletRequest, servletResponse);
    }
}

Here, CORRELATION_ID_HEADER = "x-sap-correlationId";

However, we do not see correlation Id in Kibana. We do not see  "x-sap-correlationId" as a separate field.

We tried changing CORRELATION_ID_HEADER to x-correlationId but still could not see correlation Id which is generated as part of this above code in Kibana.

Any pointer would be much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: FedML SAP Datasphere & Databricks
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for your questions . 

1) When you use FedML to source data from SAP Datasphere models, the data remains in its sources. You are federating or "reading" the data directly into compute memory for Machine learning purposes and hence not replicating it. 

2) The configuration for connecting to SAP Datapshere is different from connection to Kyma as they are two different services in BTP.  Please refer to documentation here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/datasphere-fedml/tree/main/Databricks.  

3) Yes inference can be performed on the deployed model in SAP Kyma . We have and end-to-end example that shows deployment and inferencing with SAP Kyma  . https://github.com/SAP-samples/datasphere-fedml/blob/main/Databricks/sample-notebooks/SAP%20Datasphere-FedML-Databricks-Integration-With-Deployment-to-SAP-Kyma-Kubernetes.ipynb  

4)The fedml-databricks documentation itself  shows how to use FedML with Databricks on AWS and Azure for eg.  But we have recently released a machine-learning platform independent version of the library that can be used in any machine learning platform not just databricks or hyperscalers in particular,

For further questions please feel free to reach out to us at : paa@sap.com 

Thanks,

Sangeetha

entry.title: Re: Dunning for CardCode not consolidating business partner
entry.content: You can see a consolidate amount in the Payment wizard  but still creates independent Incoming Payments. For example you can have 5 clients and see consolidated amount but still creates 5 incoming payments

entry.title: Re: Implement Role Providing Mechanism from SAP SuccessFactors to SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime
entry.content:
Hi @monika_palova ,

I am following step to step in the guide. I am working with Springboot 3.x and SAP Cloud SDK 5.x.

From my point of view some class implementations are missing, for example, I don't find the class "DestinationServiceConfiguration". Could you please share it?

Can you also share your pom.xml with all the security dependencies you are using? Because I have issues founding the classes: "UaaContextFactory", "UaaContext", "TokenRequest", ...

If you have a GitHub repository to look at it would be very helpful.

Thanks
Marco

entry.title: Re: Can't we multiply decimal numbers in SAP ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi,

you can multiply two decimal numbers in your ABAP program properly if the "Fixed point arithmetic" checkbox is marked in the program attributes (see Case 1 below, on the left side).

If the mentioned field isn't checked I get the same result as in your program (see Case 2 on the right side).

In my system in your Function Group V61A the "Fixed point arithmetic" checkbox is not marked:

In the help (F1) for this field:

If you mark this checkbox, all calculations in the program will use fixed point arithmetic.

If you do not, packed numbers (ABAP/4 type P, Dictionary types CURR, DEC or QUAN) will be treated as integers when they are used in assignments, comparisons, and calculations, irrespective of the number of decimal places defined. Intermediate results in arithmetic calculations will also be rounded to the next whole number. The number of decimal places defined is only taken into account when you output the answer using the WRITE statement.

By the way, the program status for the Function Group is "T" (Test Program). Maybe you should use for your purposes another, production, program, with fixed point arithmetic?

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration | Hands-on Video Tutorials

entry.title: Re: Cross-tab table shows duplicates. How to remove duplicates?
entry.content: I have the same issue on a Terminations Report. The total number is correct however, the detail data contains duplicates. I have added simple filters for Record Status = N as well as Effective Latest Change = Y. The duplicates returned for example have all the same information in all the fields except the Person ID and Name/Surname. So all the info belongs to only one employee but there are 3 rows, with 3 different Person IDs and Name/surnames. I've converted my Story report to Optimized hoping that would help, no luck. I'm also using Cross tab. Job Information is my starting table.  I'm using a Date input control using YTD.

entry.title: Re: Avail check showing 12/31/9999 for E/52 materials
entry.content:
Hi,

This could be due to incorrect assignment of checking rule to the material.

Check the below steps and retest the scenario with new production orders.

Check the ‘Checking Group for Availability Check’ in the material masters MRP3 view for all E/52 materials and their related components. (Example checking group 02)

Check the checking rule assigned to checking group in scope of check-OPJJ, and it’s replenished lead time indicator whether its unchecked. (Example checking rule PP)

In define checking control- OPJK, check whether the same checking rule is assigned  with the plant ,order type and the business function.

Regards,

Arjuna

entry.title: Item Category and Material type for Waste Process
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone help us with what are the item category and Material type used in the Waste process?

 I got a PDF cookbook document from SAP site, but its from 2012 and they are ask to set up the following:

Material GenItemCatGroup: LEIS

Item Category: TWKP (Csutomization)

But now I see more relevant categories are provided in the SAP standard, like Material item category group SRVP, or material type SERV service product.

Thanks in advance.

Did you solve the problem?
I'll apreciate your comments
Regards
Mariano

entry.title: Re: Gating Factor Date - View Gating Factors app SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi Harald,

Gating Factor Date is the requested date of the supply that is in conflict with the constraint. Requested date means the date when this supply would have to be executed in order to be consumable in-time by the independent demand it is pegged to.

A better way to understand it, is selecting the line in View Gating Factor and then navigating to the order network. In the order network you actually see the supply element the gating factor is assigned to and its requested date (i.e. the gating factor date).

Best regards,
Matheus

entry.title: Create a custom "Welcome Email" and send it to new users - SAP Enable Now
entry.content: I would like to know if there is a possibility of creating a welcome email for all new users registered in a Work Area. Is it possible to do this? If it's not possible to specify by Work Area, for the platform as a whole, is it possible to send a customized welcome email? Thanks, in advance!

entry.title: PO Quantity check control in MIRO while posting Customs duty invoice
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In case of Import procurement process , we are not using GR based IV Indicator in the PO. Also we need to perform MIRO for Customs duty prior to GR.

Hence users need to manually enter the quantity/value while posting Customs duty invoice during MIRO. But system allows us to enter more than the PO-Quantity to post Customs duty invoice which is not acceptable.

1. How to restrict quantity variance in MIRO line item with respect to quantities of PO item?

2. Is there any tolerance variance key which checks quantity of the PO?

For example,

If the import PO quantity is 100 KG, the system should not permit the entry of a greater quantity than stated in the PO during the posting of the Customs duty invoice in MIRO. This ensures adherence to the specified PO quantity.

Thanks,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: Initiate Onboarding Grayed Out in Latest Applicant WorkBench
entry.content:
During testing for 1H2024 in Recruiting, Initiate Onbaording is "grayed out" on the "Latest Applicant Workbench".  It shows, but cannot be selected.

However, if are in Legacy Candidate Workbench and go to Take Action, it is available and working as expected.  Has anyone else had this happen during release testing?

entry.title: Re: Developing Flask Application in BAS and consuming it into SAP UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi @debashisganguly  @ipravir ,

The tool or environment expects the service path to reference an OData service, but the API endpoint https://*.hana.ondemand.com/data is not an OData service. OData services typically have a specific structure and adhere to the OData protocol.

Since the API endpoint returns a JSON array and doesn't follow the OData protocol, you cannot use "pythonapi" destination in this scenario.

Since it is a HTTP based API, it can be done via GET request. Below is the demonstration:- 
View1.controller.js

 

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller",
    "sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel",
    "sap/m/MessageToast"
],
    /**
     * @param {typeof sap.ui.core.mvc.Controller} Controller
     */
    function (Controller,JSONModel,MessageToast) {
        "use strict";

        return Controller.extend("project1.controller.View1", {
            onInit: function () {
                this.loadDataFromAPI();
            },
            loadDataFromAPI: function() {
                var sAPIEndpoint = "https://*.hana.ondemand.com/data"; //Paste your URL here
                var oModel = new JSONModel();
          
                $.ajax({
                  url: sAPIEndpoint,
                  type: "GET",
                  success: function(data) {
                    oModel.setData(data);
                  },
                  error: function() {
                    MessageToast.show("Failed to fetch data from the API.");
                  }
                });

                this.getView().setModel(oModel,"localData");
              }
                       
        });
    });

 

View1.app.xml

 

<mvc:View controllerName="project1.controller.View1"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" displayBlock="true"
    xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <Page id="page" showHeader="false">
        <content>
            <Panel width="30%" class="panel">
                <Label text="Fetched Data From API" design="Bold"/>
                <List items="{path: 'localData>/'}">
                    <CustomListItem>
                        <HBox alignItems="Center" justifyContent="SpaceBetween">
                            <VBox class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin sapUiSmallMarginTopBottom">
                                <Text text="Name: {localData>name}"/>
                                <Text text="Role: {localData>role}"/>
                                <Text text="Location: {localData>location}"/>
                            </VBox>
                        </HBox>
                    </CustomListItem>
                </List>
            </Panel>
        </content>
    </Page>
</mvc:View>

 

Regards,
Nitish Kumar

entry.title: SNOTE Predefined values
entry.content:
While setting up the Waste solution when entering transaction ES57 Display waste disposal object we got a dump and found a SAP note 1511591 to correct it.

The isssue is that the predefined values required for Structures and functional categories are not in our system and there is no more notes or documentation on how they should be set up.

Are these values preloaded with some add on we are missing?

SAP Waste and Recycling

entry.title: Re: Dunning for CardCode not consolidating business partner

entry.title: Re: Can't we multiply decimal numbers in SAP ABAP?
entry.content: If you don't check fix point arithmetic you should use float instead of  packed numbers.

entry.title: Re: SAP Task Center setup for S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for this great blog. Can you please help me with the following error in the task center admin?

The RT destination configured for S4 backend is also enabled for TC access and is up and reachable.

Server returned HTTP response code: 401 for URL: http://xxxxx:43300/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_task_spi_replication/default/sap/api_task_spi_replication/0001/taskDefinitions?$skip=0&$top=1000&languages=en-US%2Cde-DE&sap-client=110

entry.title: Re: Anniversary Tile for Managers
entry.content: Great to know it was helpful! To access Service Date field values, you can add it to show in UDF (Employee Export) by following KBA 2420282. Or else, you can verify whether Service date and Date of birth is present or not using "Export Extended User Information -> Personal Information" export.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Email Notifications
entry.content: Hi Fernanda, do we have the provision of adding DLs (Distribution List) in notification management?

entry.title: Re: How to consume one capm service in another capm service?
entry.content:
@VenkyMIf you want to call serviceB from serviceA, please follow below steps:

  1. Create a destination for serviceB
  2. Import metadata of serviceB in the project of serviceA
  3. Use `cds.connect.to('ServiceB')` to connect to the serviceB
  4. Add the following configuration to package.json before deployment

 

"cds": {
  "requires": {
    "ServiceB": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "srv/external/ServiceB",
      "[production]": {
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "<destination for serviceB>",
          "path": "/path/to/ServiceB"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Billing Document OData - Pricing Elements No Data
entry.content:
Hi,

We've identified the following OData API for our use case. We are on S/4HANA 2022 FPS 02.

Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF

However, this does not fetch the SD Pricing Data for a given billing document although it is documented in the API reference.

On further analysis, we found that the Pricing Elements CDS view that this OData uses does not display any data. The base view I_PricingElement that gets its data from prcd_elements has an access control that is designed to never return any data

 

 

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Auto assigned mapping role for I_PricingElement' 
@MappingRole: true 
define role I_PricingElement { 
  grant 
    select 
      on 
        I_PricingElement 
          where 
            PricingDocument is null and PricingDocument is not null; 
}

 

 

 

This is a whitelisted, documented API on the API hub that does not work as expected. Am I missing something?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Fiori UI Adaptation: Hide 'Standard' View
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using UI Adaptation to hide certain fields in a standard Fiori app. What we would like to do is hide a few fields in a smart table object. As seen in the screenshot below, we have created a 'Custom' variant for the Roles table by hiding certain fields. But when the app loads with this new UI variant, the user is still able to select the 'Standard' variant for the Roles table and see All the fields, even those that were hidden in the Custom variant. How do we prevent the user from selecting the Standard variant such that only the Custom variant is selectable/displayed?

I'm pretty sure this must be a common requirement - hiding fields in tables/line items?

 

 

 

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Workzone: Task Center: Server returned HTTP response code: 401 for URL...
entry.content:
Hi,

We are setting up Task center with Workzone standard edition for a POC. We've executed the dedicated booster, set up the destination for the S4HANA, private cloud backend, and enabled it for Task center.

However, we are getting the following error in the Task center admin. Also there's an error in the service status tab: Error is: Path not found in JSON: /certificates | Error Code 500.

Server returned HTTP response code: 401 for URL: http://xxxxxxx:43300/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_task_spi_replication/default/sap/api_task_spi_replication/0001/taskDefinitions?$skip=0&$top=1000&languages=en-US%2Cde-DE&sap-client=110

Why does it say unauthorized? The backend user configured in the runtime destination has SAP_ALL, SAP_NEW and the destination is up and reachable. I've also verified that the OData service is active and can be queried outside Workzone with the same user as in the destination.

What could be the issue?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: How to keep PDF file created by output control?
entry.content:
Hi makinom,

One option is to review the PDF in the app Manage Purchase Orders - the system keeps a copy in the output management tab.

The other option, if you want to keep a soft copy for example, is to configure your Cloud Print Manager to also copy the generated PDF to a file location as well as the physical copy (if you are printing them). If you are not printing them, you can still have the Cloud Print Manager save the PDF to a local file.  (Please see the Cloud Print Manager help for details)

Thank you
Jerry

entry.title: Problem with 2023 year-end in fixed asset accounting
entry.content: We need to close the year 2023 in fixed asset accounting, but the system indicates that it is not possible because not all periodic operations have been accounted for. After the review, we found that the accounting for asset retirement in the month of December 2023 failed, for a specific valuation area (non-principal area). Since the 2023 accounting is already closed, and we are not allowed to open it, is there a way to open only the non-primary ledger to record the asset withdrawal? Is it possible to post the retirement of the 2023 asset in this year 2024 and subsequently close the year 2023 for fixed assets?

entry.title: structure configuration in the CBC
entry.content:
Hola comunidad sap, Para la edición pública de la nube de sap en la configuración de la estructura organizacional, en el CBC,

1)Para un proyecto que incluye 3 países, mi pregunta es, ¿podemos agregar tres empresas de diferentes países en un mismo proyecto? ¿O debería crear un proyecto separado para cada país y así poder crear estas empresas?

 

2) que funcionalidad tiene el “código de empresa predeterminado para chile” , this is found in the orgational structure and is requered to confirm the activity 

¡Gracias!

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for SAML Offline generator and local keystore with SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello @michellazzari 

The code seems to skip expiryInDays argument from the properties file. Please use expiryInMinutes argument

The zip package seems to have older complied version of the code. Please follow the below steps to generate the correct SAML key.

#1: Run below command against your project directory to compile and package this project:

mvn clean compile package

After execution complete, you should see a "target" directory generated. Under "target" directory, you should see "SAMLAssertionGen-1.0.0.jar" in it.

#2: Then copy SAMLAssertionGen-1.0.0.jar and modified SAMLAssertion.properties into same directory.

 


#3: Execute below command to generate SAML Assertion: java -jar SAMLAssertionGen-1.0.0.jar "SAMLAssertion.properties"

 

Below is how the properties would look like (client id and private key are required) 

 

525600 minutes is equivalent to 1yr

Hope this helps.

Kind Regards, Arnab Maji

The stock is available in the warehouse and there are no open warehouse tasks (2nd screen shot).

Please let me know if i am missing any config or what would be the issue. Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello! I am Maria.

A few years ago, my job in finance operations was jeopardized due to layoffs and department re-organizations. I decided to learn data analytics to future-proof my career. Currently, I have relocated to Canada as a full-time student studying analytics while working part-time at a retail shop. I saw this opportunity and discovered I am good fit for the program as I identify into below categories:
- Woman
- Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location
- People looking to switch their careers mid-life

Should I be chosen for the program, I will be grateful and make every effort to maximize this opportunity. I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification (SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud).

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@Attila 

Mine, I have to shut down the entire PC then reboot.  Then with command, docker restart a4h, I have to restart the instance.  Only after all this, I can re-login. It could be due to my personal PC setting since your case and mine are different.  While this is happening, I have tried everything I know, like shutting down the firewall and checking the available ports with commands, 

docker container port a4h   - Shows all the available ports.

entry.title: i am getting this error : V1 555 The sales document is not yet complete: Edit data 000000 Create del
entry.content:
Hi Everyone , while creating sales order i am getting this below error even i passed all values in BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFORMAT2

WHAT MIGHT BE THE ISSUE?

Error : V1 555 The sales document is not yet complete: Edit data 000000 Create delivery User Status Crtd TM0000000005VB while create sales order

Complete Error message

Field: ""

Id: "V1"

LogMessageNo: "000000"

LogNo: ""

Message: "The sales document is not yet complete: Edit data"

MessageV1: "Create delivery"

MessageV2: "User Status Crtd"

MessageV3: "TM0000000005VB"

Number: "555"

Parameter: "VBUVKOM"

Row: "0"

Type: "W"

ABAP Development SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: AWS SDK in UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi @nepats 

in 4 steps;

1. Install the AWS SDK for JavaScript (v3) in your SAPUI5 project. You can do this by running `npm install @aws-sdk/client-s3` (or whichever AWS service you want to connect to, lets assume s3) in your project directory. Follow these guides that say what I tell you right now;

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sdk-for-javascript/v3/developer-guide/javascript_ses_code_examples.html

https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-js-v3

2. Import the required AWS service clients and commands in your SAPUI5 controller or model files where you want to make AWS calls. For example:

 

import { S3Client, GetObjectCommand } from "@aws-sdk/client-s3";

 

3. Credentials, Initialize the AWS service client by providing your AWS region and credentials:

 

const s3Client = new S3Client({ region: "REGION", credentials: { accessKeyId: "ACCESS_KEY", secretAccessKey: "SECRET_KEY" } });

 

4. Use the AWS service. For example, to get an object from S3:

 

const command = new PutObjectCommand({ Bucket: "BUCKET_NAME", Key: "FILE_NAME", Body: "FILE_CONTENTS" });
const response = await s3Client.send(command);

 

AWS SDKs are modular, so you only need to install and import the clients for the services you want to use.For optimal performance, only import the specific AWS commands you need, not the entire service.

entry.title: Реферальный код Bitget в России: бонус qsk6 1000 USDT
entry.content: Реферальный код Bitget «qsk6» предлагает бонус в размере 1000 долларов США вместе со скидкой 50% на комиссии. Вы можете ежедневно зарабатывать баллы и обменивать их на USDT. Выполняйте задания в течение семи дней, чтобы разблокировать все награды.

entry.title: Kucoin 추천 코드: rMN4U8Y (신규 사용자 한국 보너스)
entry.content:
한국의 쿠코인 추천코드는 rMN4U8Y입니다. 추천 코드 rMN4U8Y를 사용하여 KuCoin에 가입하면 KuCoin 거래소에서 최대 $700 USDT의 보너스를 받을 수 있습니다! 또한 친구를 KuCoin에서 거래하도록 초대하면 친구의 거래 수수료에 대해 최대 40%의 커미션을 받을 수 있습니다!

 

한국의 쿠코인 추천코드는 rMN4U8Y입니다. 추천 코드 rMN4U8Y를 사용하여 KuCoin에 가입하면 KuCoin 거래소에서 최대 $700 USDT의 보너스를 받을 수 있습니다! 또한 친구를 KuCoin에서 거래하도록 초대하면 친구의 거래 수수료에 대해 최대 40%의 커미션을 받을 수 있습니다!

entry.title: Single Sign-On for SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
• IAS Tenant preparation: Log onto Identity Authentication service
  1.  Navigate to Identity provisioning > Source > Properties > sf.user.filter  make it (active eq "true")
  2. Navigate to Identity provisioning > Source > Outbound Certificates and make sure that the certificate is valid, if not generate a new one and delete the old one and activate the automatic generation
  3. Go to Identity provisioning > Target > Outbound Certificates and make sure that the certificate is valid, if not generate a new one and delete the old one and activate the automatic generation

Note: If the IAS tenant links were not provided from SAP, you can activate from the Upgrade Center, and after completing the configuration, testing and activation will be done again from the Upgrade Center

  • Created trust between Azure Active Directory and Identity Authentication service

Step 1: Download Identity Authentication service tenant metadata

Navigate to Applications and resources > Tenant Setting > Single Sign-On > SAML 2.0 Configuration and download the IAS Meta data file

Download the metadata file.

Step 2: Create enterprise application in Azure Active Directory

Navigate to the Enterprise applications, Click New application.

Azure Active Directory has templates for a variety of applications, one of them is the SAP Cloud Platform Identity Authentication Service. Search for this and select it.

A new column on the right side will appear to give the application a name. Give the application a name and click Add.

Go to Single sign-on and select SAML as Single-Sign On method.

 

 

 

 

 

STEP 3: Upload the IAS tenant metadata file you get from the step 1 

Select the application you just created, Click Upload metadata to upload the metadata file from Identity Authentication service.

All the details are now taken from the metadata file. There’s nothing to do for you other than saving the details. Therefore, click Save.

STEP 4: Download single sign-on metadata from Azure Active Directory

Download the federation metadata as shown below.

With this information we can setup the trust between Azure Active Directory and Identity Authentication service.

Step 5: Create corporate identity provider in IAS

Go back to IAS and navigate to Identity provider > Create > Microsoft ADFS / Entra AD (SAML 2.0) Type

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

STEP 6: Upload Azure Active Directory federation metadata file

Click SAML 2.0 Configuration and to upload the recently downloaded federation metadata from Azure Active Directory.

Choose the file from your local file system.

All fields below are automatically going to be filled due to the information provided through the uploaded file.

Click Save at the top of the page.

STEP 6: Add a new user in the Users and groups Microsoft Azure application

Go back to your overview of enterprise applications in Microsoft Azure AD and click your application. Add a new user by clicking Add user in the Users and groups submenu, as shown on the screenshot.

By hitting the result tile, you select the user, which should appear under Selected members panel. Finish your user assignment with clicks on Select and Assign.

Congrats Now you created trust between Azure Active Directory and Identity Authentication service.

  • IAS Tenant Final Preparation:

Navigate to Identity provisioning > Source > Jobs and run now read job to get all users from SF then schedule the job for future new hires.

Navigate to Applications and resources > Applications > SuccessFactors > Conditional Authentication and create a rule for all domains you need it to access the system from the identity provider you created... this step will define the domains witch will access as SSO, any other domain will access from the default identity provider.

 

Set the Default Identity Provider as Identity Authentication.

Navigate to Identity provider > Identity Federation > switch On Use Identity Authentication user store and Switch On User Access

Now you can test and be sure that the user you are try to test with is already added to the SF tenant.

Hope you enjoy the process.

Thanks

Ahmed Aranda

entry.title: Re: i am getting this error : V1 555 The sales document is not yet complete: Edit data 000000 Create
entry.content: BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 (not BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFORMAT2)

entry.title: Re: i am getting this error : V1 555 The sales document is not yet complete: Edit data 000000 Create
entry.content:
It has been already asked and answered.

Search "BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2" V1555 site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: Here is my submission.

entry.title: Re: Can't we multiply decimal numbers in SAP ABAP?
entry.content: Very bad solution. Don't divide by 10, 100, etc. It's done automatically by ABAP language with CURRENCY word. Search the forum and read the ABAP documentation.

entry.title: Re: Can't we multiply decimal numbers in SAP ABAP?
entry.content: Float but DECFLOAT16 or 34, not F, to avoid rounding problems.

entry.title: Re: BEx Explorer(Analyzer) can't start in win 10

entry.title: Re: CPQ Tenant New URL
entry.content:
Hi,

In addition to the answers, kindly be noted that the standard DB table tenant_environments relates the admin UI of Deployment Setup. Make sure the connection info is maintained before you use that table in your scripting.

entry.title: Reg the Routing Transfer to DMC
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings,

I am trying to simulate "Order POD" for the Discrete and one of the Pre-Requisite is to "

  • In Manage Routings/Recipes app, Relaxed Flow flag is set to "YES" for the Master Routing"

when i check the routing, i am getting only order based routing in my DMC system . The production order are getting integrated but routing is not there.

Any reason  for not getting integrated or solution to integrate the routings from SAP S4 hana to DMC

Br,

DSK

SAP Digital Manufacturing  @ManoelCosta

Hi,

In my system only order level routing is getting generated any suggestion how to transfer the routing from SAP s4 hana to the DMC system.

br,

dsk

and the ZXXX CCS is activated already

But when I extend a new material accounting view and save it, system is looking for CCS Y1 not Z3 CCS

could anyone give me some clue or guidance, why it is not directing to Z3 CCS? and configuration missing?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

 I am a SAP FICO Consultant from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP FICO for more than 2 years now. I identified as a person for this certification because I am a women, first generation college graduate in my family, People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts, 

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements.I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,
